creator: kjones@wedgie.org
text:
slib, depended upon by gnucash, fails to build.  I cvsuped the ports 10-7-00.

How-To-Repeat: Script started on Sat Oct  7 16:31:23 2000
bash-2.03# pwd
/usr/ports/lang/slib
bash-2.03# make clean
===>  Cleaning for unzip-5.41
===>  Cleaning for scheme48-0.53
===>  Cleaning for slib-2c7
bash-2.03# make
===>  Extracting for slib-2c7
